creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
With ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS=yes, the last part are as follows.
This looks like the failure mode reported on Bug 255007.

In both cases (ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS=yes or not), this happenes very late stage of builds, toooo time consuming to reproduce further. Giving up. :-(
